title: festuca ovina subsp. occitanica
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. occitanica, also known as Occitan fescue, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Festuca. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as a demulcent to soothe irritated mucous membranes. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. occitanica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
